name: Patient X
history: Multiple past jobs involved micromanagement. Reports self-blame in work contexts.
intermediate_belief: I must perform perfectly to avoid criticism.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I make mistakes, I will be criticized and feel worthless.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of tasks and procrastination due to fear of making mistakes.
situation: Experiencing micromanagement at the workplace and considering resigning.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right; everything is going wrong.
behavior: Avoidance of tasks, procrastination, and considering resignation.
